text:
(In reply to Kristof Provost from comment #1)

"you can use dummynet with pf, and can also do basic layer 2 filtering with pf.
No doubt it's also possible to implement captive portal entirely with ipfw."

I am also using ip_divert with ipfw because PF divert-to not works as expected #260867 this bug references divert-to infinite loop problem this bug still exists

"Correct. pf_route() calls ifp->if_output() directly and the packet will not be seen by another firewall."

Sorry to bother but i am confused about PFILCTL tool, to make it clear What is this tool's main purpose?
